column3: Question
column4: Answer

column3: How do I place an order?
column4: Simply select your item, choose the size/color, click "Add to Cart," and proceed to checkout to enter your details.

column3: Can I modify or cancel my order?
column4: You can cancel within 1 hour of placing the order by contacting customer support. Modifications are generally not possible once the order is confirmed.

column3: What should I do if a favorite item is sold out?
column4: Click the "Notify Me" button on the product page to receive an email alert as soon as it's restocked.

column3: Is a pre-order guaranteed?
column4: Pre-orders guarantee your item upon availability; however, the estimated delivery date is subject to change.

column3: How do I apply a discount code?
column4: Enter the code in the designated "Discount Code" box on the checkout page and click "Apply."

column3: Do I need an account to checkout?
column4: No, you can check out as a guest, but an account allows you to save your address and track orders easily.

column3: How do I update my shipping address?
column4: You can update it in your "My Account" section, or during the checkout process for your current order.

column3: How often do you restock items?
column4: Restocks vary by popularity and supplier availability; high-demand items are often restocked within 2-4 weeks.

column3: Do your "Final Sale" items ever return to stock?
column4: No, "Final Sale" items are typically clearance and will not be restocked.

column3: What payment methods are accepted?
column4: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex), PayPal, and Buy Now, Pay Later options (e.g., Klarna, Afterpay).

column3: When is my credit card charged?
column4: Your card is charged immediately upon order confirmation and processing.

column3: Why was my payment declined?
column4: This could be due to incorrect card details or insufficient funds. Please check your card information or contact your bank.

column3: When will I receive my order confirmation?
column4: You should receive it via email within a few minutes of placing your order. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

column3: Do you offer price adjustments?
column4: We offer a one-time price adjustment for items purchased at full price that go on sale within 7 days of the purchase date.

column3: Will I be charged sales tax?
column4: Sales tax is applied according to the tax laws of your shipping destination and will be displayed at checkout.

column3: How do I reset my forgotten password?
column4: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page; a reset link will be sent to your registered email address.

column3: Can I combine multiple discount codes?
column4: No, only one promotional code can be used per order.

column3: How do I remove an item from my cart?
column4: Click the cart icon, find the item, and click the "Remove" or 'X' icon next to it.

column3: What should I do if I entered the wrong email address?
column4: Contact Customer Service immediately with your name and order details so we can update it and resend the confirmation.

column3: Are your collections limited edition?
column4: Most items are part of our core collection, but some collaborations or styles are labeled as limited-edition.

column3: How do I unsubscribe from marketing emails?
column4: Click the "Unsubscribe" link at the bottom of any marketing email you receive from us.

column3: Do you accept gift cards?
column4: Yes, physical and e-gift cards can be redeemed at the payment stage of checkout.

column3: Is there a maximum limit on order quantity?
column4: For most items, no. For very limited-edition pieces, a limit may be applied and noted on the product page.

column3: What is my order number?
column4: Your order number is a unique reference found in your confirmation email and in your "Order History" in your account.

column3: How can I view my past purchases?
column4: Log in to your account and go to the "Order History" or "My Orders" tab.

column3: What are your standard delivery times?
column4: Standard delivery typically takes 3-7 business days after the order has been processed.

column3: Do you offer expedited (express) shipping?
column4: Yes, we offer an Express Shipping option, usually delivered within 1-2 business days.

column3: How are shipping costs calculated?
column4: Shipping costs are calculated based on your location and the selected shipping speed. The final cost is shown at checkout.

column3: How do I track my package?
column4: A tracking number and a link to the carrier's website will be emailed to you as soon as your order ships.

column3: When will I receive my tracking number?
column4: The tracking number is typically sent 1-2 business days after the order is placed, once the package leaves our facility.

column3: Do you ship internationally?
column4: Yes, we ship to most countries. International shipping options and costs are available at checkout.

column3: Are there duties or customs fees for international orders?
column4: Yes, the customer is responsible for all import duties, customs, and local taxes levied by their country.

column3: Which carriers do you use?
column4: We primarily use FedEx, UPS, and DHL for both domestic and international shipments.

column3: How long is the order processing time?
column4: Orders are processed and prepared for shipping within 1-3 business days.

column3: What if my package shows "delivered" but I haven't received it?
column4: Please check with neighbors and your local post office. If still missing, contact us within 48 hours to start a trace.

column3: What happens if my package is lost in transit?
column4: Contact us, and we will open an investigation with the carrier. If confirmed lost, we will issue a full refund or replacement.

column3: Can I change the shipping address after I get the tracking number?
column4: Once the order is in transit, we cannot change the address. Please ensure your address is correct upon checkout.

column3: Is a signature required for delivery?
column4: A signature is required for all orders over a certain value (typically $300) to ensure secure delivery.

column3: What happens if I'm not home for delivery?
column4: The carrier will usually leave a delivery attempt notice with instructions for rescheduling or pickup.

column3: Do you deliver to P.O. Boxes or APO/FPO addresses?
column4: We can deliver smaller apparel orders to P.O. Boxes, but not most bag orders. APO/FPO addresses are accepted.

column3: Is there a minimum purchase for free shipping?
column4: Yes, we offer free standard shipping on all domestic orders over a specified amount (e.g., $150).

column3: Can I pay to rush the processing time?
column4: Currently, we do not offer a service to expedite the internal processing time; only the shipping transit time can be expedited.

column3: My tracking hasn't updated in a few days; is there a problem?
column4: This is common. If there's no update for more than 5 business days, please contact our support team.

column3: Can I select an international carrier?
column4: You can choose from the available international carrier options presented during checkout.

column3: How are the items packaged?
column4: Apparel is typically shipped in sealed, protective poly-bags; bags are shipped in dust bags inside sturdy boxes.

column3: Do you offer in-store pickup?
column4: If we have physical locations, yes, we offer a Click-and-Collect option at select stores.

column3: My package arrived damaged. What should I do?
column4: Take photos of the damaged package and items immediately and contact customer support.

column3: What is the cutoff time for same-day shipping?
column4: If applicable, orders must be placed by 2:00 PM EST for same-day express shipping (on business days).

column3: Why is international shipping so expensive?
column4: The cost includes air freight, fuel surcharges, and basic insurance coverage.

column3: What if my package is returned to you due to an incorrect address?
column4: We will contact you to arrange a re-shipment, which may incur a new shipping fee.

column3: What is your return window?
column4: We accept returns for a refund or exchange within 30 days of the delivery date.

column3: How do I start a return?
column4: Visit our Returns Portal on the website and enter your order number and email address to generate a shipping label.

column3: Are return labels provided?
column4: Yes, we provide a pre-paid return label for domestic returns, with the cost deducted from your refund.

column3: What condition must the item be in for a return?
column4: Items must be unworn, unwashed, and have all original tags attached, including any security tags.

column3: Can I return a bag that has been used once?
column4: No, bags must show no signs of use (scratches, stains, damage) and include the original dust bag.

column3: How do I process an exchange for a different size?
column4: Select the "Exchange" option in the Returns Portal for the size you need. The new size will be shipped once the original is received.

column3: How long does it take to process a refund?
column4: Once the return is received and inspected (3-5 days), the refund is processed immediately, taking an additional 5-10 business days to appear in your account.

column3: Will I be refunded the original shipping cost?
column4: No, the original shipping costs are non-refundable unless the item was damaged or incorrect.

column3: How will the refund be issued?
column4: Refunds are processed back to the original payment method used for the purchase.

column3: Can I exchange for a different item altogether?
column4: You can return the original item for a refund and then place a new order for the desired item.

column3: Can I return an item that was a gift?
column4: Yes, gifts can be returned for an e-gift card of equal value if you do not have the original proof of purchase.

column3: What if I receive a defective or incorrect item?
column4: Contact us immediately with photos. We will provide a free return label and ship a replacement or issue a full refund.

column3: What is the return policy for international orders?
column4: International returns are accepted, but the customer is responsible for all return shipping costs and customs duties.

column3: What if the security tag is detached?
column4: The item cannot be returned if the security or original price tags are removed or damaged.

column3: What if the requested exchange size is out of stock?
column4: We will notify you and automatically issue a full refund instead.

column3: Is there a restocking fee for returns?
column4: No, we do not charge a restocking fee, but the return label cost is deducted from the refund amount.

column3: What if my return is delivered outside the 30-day window?
column4: Returns received after 30 days may be accepted for store credit only, at our discretion.

column3: What is your policy on "Final Sale" returns?
column4: All Final Sale items are non-refundable and non-exchangeable. This policy is clearly marked on the product page.

column3: Do I need to return items in the original packaging?
column4: While not mandatory, we recommend using the original packaging to protect the items during transit.

column3: Why is my refund taking so long?
column4: Banks and credit card companies may take longer to process the funds; contact your bank first if it exceeds the 10-day window.

column3: Do I need to include the original invoice in the return?
column4: Yes, please include the original packing slip/invoice inside the package to expedite processing.

column3: What is the warranty on bags?
column4: Our bags come with a 6-month limited warranty against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase.

column3: Can I exchange for a higher-priced item?
column4: Yes, you will be prompted to pay the difference in price during the exchange process.

column3: Can I return online purchases to a physical store?
column4: Yes, if applicable, online purchases can be returned to any of our physical store locations for free.

column3: Where can I find the full Returns Policy?
column4: The detailed policy is available via a link in the website footer under "Returns & Exchanges."

column3: Where can I find the size chart?
column4: A detailed size chart is available on every apparel product page, usually near the size selection dropdown.

column3: Do your sizes run true to size?
column4: Generally yes, but check the "Fit Notes" section on the product page, which advises if an item runs small or large.

column3: What is the material of the apparel?
column4: The material composition is listed under the "Details" or "Fabric & Care" tab on the product page.

column3: How should I wash the apparel?
column4: Specific care instructions are on the garment's label and in the "Fabric & Care" tab online.

column3: Can your bags fit a laptop?
column4: Check the "Dimensions" section. We specify which models fit a 13" or 15" laptop.

column3: Are your bags genuine leather?
column4: The material is always specified: either Genuine Leather, Vegan Leather, or Canvas/Fabric.

column3: How do I clean my leather bag?
column4: Use a soft, damp cloth and a leather-specific cleaner. Avoid harsh chemicals and excessive water.

column3: Do you offer petite or tall sizing?
column4: Yes, select items are available in Petite (P) and Tall (T) lengths, noted in the size selector.

column3: How accurate are the online product colors?
column4: We strive for accuracy, but colors may vary slightly due to your monitor's display settings.

column3: Are the bag straps adjustable?
column4: Most of our work bags feature adjustable and/or removable shoulder straps; details are on the product page.

column3: What does "Tailored Fit" mean?
column4: A Tailored Fit is cut close to the body for a sharp, professional silhouette.

column3: What does "Relaxed Fit" mean?
column4: A Relaxed Fit offers more room in the chest, waist, and hips for comfort without looking sloppy.

column3: Are your trousers high-waisted or mid-rise?
column4: The rise (High, Mid, Low) is specified in the product description details.

column3: Are your work dresses lined?
column4: Most of our professional dresses are fully lined for better structure and comfort.

column3: Do your bags have internal organization?
column4: Yes, our work bags feature internal pockets, pen slots, and padded laptop sleeves; check the gallery for interior photos.

column3: Are your materials sustainably sourced?
column4: We highlight items made with recycled materials or sustainable fabrics with a dedicated icon or tag.

column3: What is the quality of your hardware on bags?
column4: We use durable, high-quality hardware (typically brass or stainless steel) designed for frequent use.

column3: How do I find the best fit for a blazer?
column4: Focus on the shoulder seam placement. It should align with the edge of your natural shoulder.

column3: Which fabrics are best for travel (wrinkle-free)?
column4: Look for our items made with performance blends or ponte knit fabric, known for wrinkle resistance.

column3: Are your bags water-resistant?
column4: Water-resistance is mentioned in the product features; generally, our vegan and nylon bags offer some resistance.

column3: Do you sell sets or separates?
column4: We sell both. Our suits are often sold as separates so you can mix and match sizes (e.g., blazer and pants).

column3: Do your skirts have pockets?
column4: We specify if a skirt features functional pockets in the product details.

column3: How heavy are the bags empty?
column4: The product description includes the weight of the bag for better commuting planning.

column3: How do I know the apparel is high quality?
column4: Look for details like fully lined garments, finished seams, and high-thread-count fabrics mentioned in the description.

column3: What if I am between two sizes?
column4: We recommend sizing up for a blazer or jacket and sizing down for fitted trousers or skirts.
